name: Beef and Broccoli Stir-Fry
description: Quick skillet beef with broccoli in a savory sauce.
directions: Cook rice and set aside.
Sear beef strips in a hot skillet until browned.
Add onion, broccoli, and garlic and cook until tender-crisp.
Stir in soy sauce and brown sugar and toss to coat.
Serve over rice.

name: Beef Banh Mi Bowls
description: Seasoned beef over rice with quick cucumber and carrot topping.
directions: Cook rice and set aside.
Brown beef in a skillet and season with soy sauce.
Julienne cucumber and carrot and toss with a splash of vinegar.
Serve beef over rice and top with vegetables and green onion.

name: Beef Lo Mein
description: Tender beef and noodles tossed with vegetables.
directions: Cook noodles and drain.
Cook beef in a large skillet until browned.
Add vegetables and garlic and stir-fry until just tender.
Toss in cooked noodles and soy sauce.
Serve hot.

name: Beef Stroganoff
description: Creamy beef and mushroom skillet served over noodles.
directions: Cook egg noodles.
Brown beef in a skillet and remove.
Cook onion, mushrooms, and garlic until softened.
Add broth and simmer briefly, then stir in sour cream.
Return beef to pan and serve over noodles.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Rich meat sauce served over spaghetti.
directions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
Brown beef in a pot.
Add onion, garlic, and carrot and cook until softened.
Stir in tomatoes and simmer until thickened.
Serve over spaghetti.

name: Beef Brisket Pot Roast
description: Slow-cooked beef with potatoes, carrots, and onion.
directions: Season roast and sear in a heavy pot.
Add chopped vegetables and broth.
Cover and braise until beef is fork tender.
Slice or shred and serve with vegetables.

name: Braised Beef Chili
description: Hearty chili with beef, onion, and peppers.
directions: Brown beef in a pot.
Add onion, pepper, and garlic and cook until softened.
Stir in tomatoes and chili seasoning.
Simmer until flavors come together.
Serve hot.

name: Corned Beef and Cabbage
description: Classic corned beef dinner with cabbage and potatoes.
directions: Simmer corned beef until tender.
Add potatoes, carrots, and onion and cook until nearly tender.
Add cabbage wedges and cook until softened.
Slice beef and serve with vegetables.

name: Minced Beef Pie
description: Savory beef and onion filling baked with a crust.
directions: Brown beef with onion and carrot.
Stir in peas and gravy and let cool slightly.
Fill pie crust with mixture and top as desired.
Bake until golden and bubbling.

name: Steak Diane
description: Pan-seared steak with a quick mushroom-onion sauce.
directions: Cook potatoes separately if serving alongside.
Sear steaks to desired doneness and rest.
Cook mushrooms, onion, and garlic in the same pan.
Finish sauce with butter and spoon over steaks.
